title: Columns fields on item detailpage
excerpt:

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Whenever I work inside a board and its items I find myself switching back and forward from the board to the updates just to check the information of the status of a column.

It would be great and a huge timesaver to be able to create or edit updates or comments while being able to reach the data on the columns (for example status or deadline columns).

Screenshot_2020-01-13_at_23_42_44_png_and_monday_-_Nldoet_OF___Sitelist3074×1640 712 KB

posts.author: barbarousgiants (David)
posts.cookedHtml:
It took me a while to realize that this isn’t possible. I clicked around trying to add columns to the “detail view” but gave up.

I am hiding some columns but I still want to see them in some sort of detail view. At least a “description” or “summary” field would be very useful

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
@monday-team I must say it is really awesome that this feature is implemented. Using it everyday and it saves times and gives me a better overview of the item I am viewing.

I will take my vote from this item in the community but that’s because of the limitations on the amount of votes.
I really do hope this feature will be supported in the future and even get some love and attention.

Two things that I would live to see being added / improved;

  1. Fully support of link to items columns
  2. Make the update section in this view a bit wider. This way buttons can be shown fully and text wil be a bit more readable

Thanks in advance!
